expectations.text: Applies ADDED requirements to main specs
expectations.evidence: Step 4 detects ADDED changes in delta, shows combined diff, then delegates to /opsx-sync which inserts new requirements.
Step 4 identifies modifications in the combined diff; /opsx-sync updates existing entries.
Step 4 lists removals in combined diff summary; /opsx-sync handles deletion.

expectations.text: Preserves existing content not mentioned in delta
expectations.evidence: Implied by scope-limited sync: only listed changes applied; content not in delta untouched.

notes: All sync behaviors delegated to /opsx-sync. Archive skill is a thin wrapper (discovery + prompt + handoff). Quality depends on /opsx-sync implementation.
